methodology.opening: candidate's frozen pregame line and price
methodology.closing: latest captured market at or before verified game start
methodology.line_clv_direction: positive means the frozen line was better for the selected side
methodology.price_clv_direction: positive means the market's closing implied probability was higher than at snapshot
